quotedUser.text:
Token standards are how DeFi scales.

ERC-20 gave every token the same interface. Any wallet, any protocol, it just works.

ERC-4626 did the same for vaults.

One standard for deposits, withdrawals, and yield. That's why @Aave, @Morpho, and @eulerfinance are interoperable; they speak the same langua...

title: Digital asset adoption will be driven by infrastructure that connects new rails with existing financial systems.
snippet: Canton Network (@CantonNetwork): Digital asset adoption will be driven by infrastructure that connects new rails with existing financial systems. Partnerships that bridge onchain innovation with global payments networks help make that adoption real.

title: We just got covered by @Cointelegraph and @TheBlockCo on our latest Babylon x @Ledger announcement!
snippet: Babylon (@babylonlabs_io): We just got covered by @Cointelegraph and @TheBlockCo on our latest Babylon x @Ledger announcement! Clear Signing for Trustless Bitcoin Vaults means 8M+ self-custody BTC holders can review vault actions on their hardware device, while BTC stays on Bitcoin. Read them here 👇

quotedUser.name: Babylon
quotedUser.text:
What happens when trustless Bitcoin vaults meet the world’s most widely used self-custody hardware ecosystem?

Babylon and @Ledger integration brings native Ledger signer support to Babylon Trustless Bitcoin Vaults.

With Ledger Clear Signing, 8 million users will be able to interact with TBV.

title: Unlocking Bitcoin’s utility while maintaining uncompromising security. 👏
snippet: Bedrock | Liquid BTC Restaking 🟠 (@Bedrock_DeFi): Unlocking Bitcoin’s utility while maintaining uncompromising security. 👏 Proud to see our partners at @babylonlabs_io expanding access to Trustless Bitcoin Vaults alongside @Ledger.

quotedUser.name: Babylon
quotedUser.text:
Babylon is expanding access to Trustless Bitcoin Vaults by integrating with Ledger
